'''ây-m-d''' ('''yamada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbelieve|unbelieve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbelieve|unbelieve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-m-d
|-
! Lemma
| yamada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yamadithi|yamadithi]] || [[word:yamadiji|yamadiji]] || [[word:yamadishi|yamadishi]] || [[word:yamadi|yamadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yamaduthuth|yamaduthuth]] || [[word:yamadujuj|yamadujuj]] || [[word:yamadushush|yamadushush]] || [[word:yamad|yamad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yamaduthu|yamaduthu]] || [[word:yamaduju|yamaduju]] || [[word:yamadushu|yamadushu]] || [[word:yamadu|yamadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yamadufuth|yamadufuth]] || [[word:yamadufuj|yamadufuj]] || [[word:yamadufush|yamadufush]] || [[word:yamaduf|yamaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yamadethe|yamadethe]] || [[word:yamadeje|yamadeje]] || [[word:yamadeshe|yamadeshe]] || [[word:yamade|yamade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yamadothoth|yamadothoth]] || [[word:yamadojoj|yamadojoj]] || [[word:yamadoshosh|yamadoshosh]] || [[word:yamad|yamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yamadotho|yamadotho]] || [[word:yamadojo|yamadojo]] || [[word:yamadosho|yamadosho]] || [[word:yamado|yamado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yamadofoth|yamadofoth]] || [[word:yamadofoj|yamadofoj]] || [[word:yamadofosh|yamadofosh]] || [[word:yamadof|yamadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yamadĂŠthĂŠ|yamadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yamadĂŠjĂŠ|yamadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yamadĂŠshĂŠ|yamadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yamadĂŠ|yamadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yamadathath|yamadathath]] || [[word:yamadajaj|yamadajaj]] || [[word:yamadashash|yamadashash]] || [[word:yamad|yamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yamadatha|yamadatha]] || [[word:yamadaja|yamadaja]] || [[word:yamadasha|yamadasha]] || [[word:yamada|yamada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yamadafath|yamadafath]] || [[word:yamadafaj|yamadafaj]] || [[word:yamadafash|yamadafash]] || [[word:yamadaf|yamadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yamadasha|yamadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyamadasha|goyamadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyamadasha|gokiyamadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yamadnĂŒsha|yamadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyamadnknĂŒsha|goyamadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyamadnĂŒsha|gokiyamadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yamadshĂ«sha|yamadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyamadnkshĂ«sha|goyamadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyamadshĂ«sha|gokiyamadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yamadrosha|yamadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyamadnkrosha|goyamadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyamadrosha|gokiyamadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yamadmusha|yamadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyamadnkmusha|goyamadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyamadmusha|gokiyamadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yamadsherasha|yamadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyamadnksherasha|goyamadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyamadsherasha|gokiyamadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yamadngasha|yamadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyamadnkngasha|goyamadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyamadngasha|gokiyamadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yamadyasha|yamadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyamadnkyasha|goyamadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyamadyasha|gokiyamadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yamadyamasha|yamadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyamadnkyamasha|goyamadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyamadyamasha|gokiyamadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yamadnĂŒshĂ«sha|yamadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyamadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyamadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyamadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyamadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yamadnĂŒrosha|yamadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyamadnknĂŒrosha|goyamadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyamadnĂŒrosha|gokiyamadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamadnĂŒmusha|yamadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyamadnknĂŒmusha|goyamadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyamadnĂŒmusha|gokiyamadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yamadshĂ«nĂŒsha|yamadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyamadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyamadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyamadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyamadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yamadshĂ«rosha|yamadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyamadnkshĂ«rosha|goyamadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyamadshĂ«rosha|gokiyamadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamadshĂ«musha|yamadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyamadnkshĂ«musha|goyamadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyamadshĂ«musha|gokiyamadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yamadronĂŒsha|yamadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyamadnkronĂŒsha|goyamadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyamadronĂŒsha|gokiyamadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yamadroshĂ«sha|yamadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyamadnkroshĂ«sha|goyamadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyamadroshĂ«sha|gokiyamadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamadromusha|yamadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyamadnkromusha|goyamadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyamadromusha|gokiyamadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yamadmunĂŒsha|yamadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyamadnkmunĂŒsha|goyamadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyamadmunĂŒsha|gokiyamadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yamadmushĂ«sha|yamadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyamadnkmushĂ«sha|goyamadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyamadmushĂ«sha|gokiyamadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yamadmurosha|yamadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyamadnkmurosha|goyamadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyamadmurosha|gokiyamadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yamad|yamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠd|yĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyamad|hoyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠmĂŠd|hoyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyamad|hohoyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠmĂŠd|hohoyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyamad|nĂŒyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠmĂŠd|nĂŒyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyamad|nĂŒnĂŒyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠmĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyamad|nĂŻyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠmĂŠd|nĂŻyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyamad|nĂŻnĂŻyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠmĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyamad|luyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠmĂŠd|luyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyamad|luluyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠmĂŠd|luluyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyamad|liyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠmĂŠd|liyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyamad|liliyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠmĂŠd|liliyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyamad|koyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠmĂŠd|koyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyamad|kokoyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠmĂŠd|kokoyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyamad|keyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠmĂŠd|keyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyamad|kekeyamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠmĂŠd|kekeyĂŠmĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
